releaseOutcome.description: The final release decision, already determined upstream. One of: RELEASED, RELEASED_WITH_OVERRIDE, REJECTED.

docResult.description: Document verification verdict: PASS, FAIL, or REVIEW.

docComment.description: One-sentence summary of the document verification result.

partyResult.description: Party screening verdict: PASS, FAIL, or REVIEW.

partyComment.description: One-sentence summary of the party screening result.

portResult.description: Port readiness verdict: PASS, FAIL, or REVIEW.

portComment.description: One-sentence summary of the port readiness check.

reviewDecision.description: Human review decision if a check was escalated, e.g. APPROVE or REJECT. Empty string if no human review occurred.

reviewComment.description: Human reviewer's note explaining the review decision. Empty string if no human review occurred.

closureSummary.description: Human-readable prose closure summary for a Release Manager. One clean professional paragraph (4-6 sentences). Leads with the outcome in capitals (RELEASED, RELEASED WITH OVERRIDE, REJECTED). No bullet points, no headers, no JSON.
